trades.reasoning: Perfect 5/5 signal score with MACD crossover, RSI 61.7 (lowest among 100-scorers — most room before overbought), price 5.9% above SMA-20, and volume surge confirming institutional participation on a risk-on day.

decisions.briefing: Market is risk-on at +0.7% across both NASDAQ and S&P 500 — not a blowout day, but clearly positive and sufficient to deploy the remaining $577 in cash. INFQ leads all candidates with a perfect 5/5 signal stack and the lowest RSI among perfect-scorers, giving the most room to run before hitting overbought territory. Existing positions are held — no stop-loss or profit-target signals warrant manual exits today.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities closed higher on July 2 with the S&P 500 and NASDAQ each gaining roughly 0.7%, supported by continued optimism around moderating inflation data and resilient labor market readings heading into the July 4 holiday. Small- and mid-cap momentum names outperformed as investors rotated into higher-beta growth stocks following a relatively calm week for macro surprises. Trading volume was lighter than average ahead of the long weekend, which can amplify price moves in both directions for thinly traded names.
market_education.summary_zh: 美國股市於7月2日收高，標普500指數與納斯達克指數均上漲約0.7%，受通脹數據持續降溫及勞工市場韌性支撐，市場情緒在獨立紀念日長假前夕保持樂觀。小型及中型成長股表現優於大盤，投資人在宏觀面相對平靜的背景下輪動至高貝塔股票。惟長假前夕成交量偏低，部分流動性較差的股票價格波動可能因此被放大。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Multi-signal confirmation means requiring several independent technical indicators to all agree before entering a trade — for example, MACD crossover, RSI in the bullish zone, price above the 20-day moving average, and a volume surge all firing together. Each signal alone can produce false positives, but when multiple signals align simultaneously it suggests real buying pressure rather than a random fluctuation. INFQ today hit all five criteria, which is the standard this portfolio uses for its highest-conviction buys.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 多重信號確認是指在入場前要求多個獨立技術指標同時發出買入訊號，例如MACD黃金交叉、RSI處於強勢區間、股價站上20日均線，以及成交量明顯放大等條件一次齊現。單一指標容易產生假訊號，但多個指標同步確認，代表市場存在真實的買盤力道，而非隨機波動。INFQ今日同時滿足全部五項標準，正是本投資組合最高信心買進的依據。
